folio.label: 80v
folio.l: Maketú his god , and eke hi~ self to knowe
Pouerte , a spectakil is , as thynketú me
Thurgú whicú he may , his verray frendes se
And æäfore sire , syn that I nou©t ©ow greue
Of my pouerte , no more ©e me repreeue
Now sire , of elde ©e repreeue me
And certes Sire , thougú non auctorite
Were in no bok , ©e gentiles of honour
Seyn , æ men shulde , an olde wygút do fauour
And clepe hi~ fader , for ©oure gentilnesse
And auctoures shal I fynden , as I gesse
Now there as ©e seyn , æat I am foul and old
Than drede ©ow nougút , to ben a Cokewold
For filthe and elde , also mot I the
Ben grete wardeyns , vp on chastite
But neuäetheles , syn I knowe ©oure delite
I shal fulfille , ©oure worldly appetite
Chese now q¶ she , on of theise thynges twey
To han me foul and old , til that I deydydey
And be to ©ow , a trewe humble wyf´
And neuäe ©ow displese , in al my lyf
Or ellis ©e wyl han me , ©ongö and faire
And take ©oure auenture , of the repaire
That shal be to ©oure hous , by cause of me
Or in som other place , it may wel be
Now chese ©oure self , wheiæä that ©ow liketú
This knygút auysetú hi~ , & sore syketú
But at the last , he seide in this manere
My lady & my loue , and wyf so dere
I putte me , in ©oure wyse gouänaunce
Chesetú ©oure self , whicú may be most plesaunce
And most honour , to ©ow and me also
I do no force , wheither of the two
For as ©ow liketú , it suffisetú me
Than haue I get of ©ow , the maistrye q¶ she
Syn I may chese , and gouerne as me list
ñe certes wyf q¶ he , I holde it the best
Kisse me q¶ she , we be no lengere wrothe
For be my trouthe , I shal be to ©ow bothe
This is to seyn , ©e bothe fair and good
I preye to god , that I mot steruen wood
But I to ©ow , be also good and trewe
As euäe was wyf , sithe æ the world was newe
And but I be to morwe , as fair to sene
As any lady , Em¹esse or Quene
That is be twix the Est , & eke the west
Do witú my lif and detú , rigút as ©ow list

note.notetxt: 1221the last three lines are compressed, same problem and there is a cross in dry point next to them.ODR
